# Game component color refactoring (2026-03-06 19:03Z)

_**User**_

You need to refactor game component files in the Lesury project at /Users/jakubstastny/Cursor projects/personal/lesury/apps/web to replace all hardcoded hex colors with shadcn/ui semantic token classes.

The color mapping is:
- `bg-[#FAF9F5]` → `bg-background`
- `bg-[#141413]` → `bg-primary`
- `text-[#141413]` → `text-foreground`
- `text-[#FAF9F5]` → `text-primary-foreground`
- `bg-[#F0EFEA]` → `bg-muted` or `bg-secondary`
- `text-[#B0AEA5]` → `text-muted-foreground`
- `border-[#E8E6DC]` → `border-border`
- `bg-[#D97757]` → `bg-accent`
- `hover:bg-[#CC785C]` → `hover:bg-accent-hover`
- `text-[#D97757]` → `text-accent`
- `bg-[#E8E6DC]` → `bg-border` (for background elements) or `bg-background-tertiary`
- `bg-white` → `bg-card`
- `border border-[#E8E6DC]` → `border border-border`
- `border-t-[#141413]` → `border-t-foreground`
- `border-t-[#D97757]` → `border-t-accent`
- `text-white` → `text-accent-foreground` (when on accent background) or `text-primary-foreground` (when on primary bg)
- `bg-[#788C5D]` and `text-[#788C5D]` → keep the hex for game-specific accent green (these are result indicators)
- `bg-[#CC785C]` and `text-[#CC785C]` → keep the hex for game-specific accent hover
- `hover:bg-[#2a2a28]` → `hover:bg-[#2a2a28]` (keep for dark buttons)
- `active:bg-[#3a3a38]` → keep as-is
- `active:bg-[#B86947]` → keep as-is

For `bg-[#2A2A2A]` (dark game backgrounds), keep as-is.

Also:
- Keep Framer Motion animations exactly as they are
- Keep game logic/socket code exactly as they are
- Only change CSS class names from hardcoded hex to semantic tokens
- For inline styles that use hex colors for dynamic purposes (category colors, progress bars), keep them as-is
- For QR code generation color options, keep them as-is (they need actual hex values)

Files to refactor:
1. components/games/the-line/TheLineHost.tsx
2. components/games/the-line/TheLinePlayer.tsx
3. components/games/guessio/GuessioHost.tsx
4. components/games/guessio/GuessioPlayer.tsx
5. components/games/mindshot/MindshotHost.tsx
6. components/games/mindshot/MindshotPlayer.tsx
7. components/games/zoom/ZoomHost.tsx
8. components/games/zoom/ZoomPlayer.tsx

Read each file, apply the color mapping replacements, and write the updated file back. Make sure NOT to change any logic, only CSS classes.
